Subject: Columbia Gas Flexible Balancing PAL Open Season # 2026-0319
Author: Diana Roberts
Notice Text
Subject: Columbia Gas Transmission, LLC (“Columbia Gas”) Flexible Balancing PAL Open Season
#2026-0319
 
 
 
 
Columbia Gas is soliciting bids from interested parties for a monthly balancing service under its existing PAL Rate Schedule* (“PAL”)at TCO Pool (P10) under the following terms:
 
 
TERM:                                                                           April 1, 2026 – September 30, 2026**
 
Maximum Total Parked/Loaned Inventory (MIQ):                           +/- 200,000 Dth***
Maximum Daily Parked/Unparked Quantity:                                              15,000 Dth
Maximum Daily Loaned/Returned Quantity:                                              15,000 Dth     
Location:                                                                                              TCO Pool (P10)
 
*Please note PAL is an interruptible service
**Shipper’s PAL Inventory must be zero by the end of term
***PAL Inventory can be taken negative up to the MIQ
 
Columbia Gas will receive bids beginning Thursday March 19, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. Central Time (“CT”) through Thursday March 26, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. CT.
 
Columbia Gas notes that the maximum applicable Recourse Rate for the capacity posted in this open season is the Total Effective Rate (maximum base tariff rate plus all applicable surcharges) for Rate Schedule PAL, as set for in the Tariff
 
Participation in the Bidding Process – All bids submitted in this open season will be treated in a nondiscriminatory manner pursuant to the terms posted in this open season.  To participate in the bidding process, interested parties must send an email with bid terms to:
 
Diana_Roberts@TCEnergy.com
 
 
All bids should refer to Open Season # 2026-0319 Columbia Gas Flexible Balancing PAL.
 
 
 
 
 
 
All bids should be submitted in the form of a monthly rate due Columbia Gas.
 
To participate, all interested parties must have a fully-executed MASTER PAL Agreement in place with Columbia Gas. If you do not have a MASTER PAL Agreement in place and would like to participate in this open season, please contact the Columbia Gas representatives below.
 
A bid must contain all of the applicable information required by the Bid Form at the end of this posting.  Bidders must satisfy creditworthiness in accordance with Columbia Gas’s FERC Gas Tariff (“Tariff”).  A potential shipper may submit multiple bids, each higher than its preceding bid, for all or any portion of the capacity or term of service made available by Columbia Gas. If a bidder submits multiple bids, Columbia Gas will consider only the last, highest bid submitted by bidder for the purpose of awarding this open season.
Assessing Bids- Columbia Gas reserves the right to reject any bids that do not conform to the terms listed herein.  Columbia Gas reserves the right to reject any bid that is incomplete or includes conditions or provisions that Columbia Gas determines, in its reasonable discretion, to be unacceptable. Columbia Gas reserves the right to reject any bid or request that contains modifications to the Bid Form or conflicts with Columbia Gas’s Tariff.  Columbia Gas has the right to clarify bids.
 
 
Awarding of Service –– Columbia Gas will notify successful bidders no later than 2:00 PM CT, Thursday March 26, 2026.   Any awards under this open season will be made independently based upon objective criteria and the economic value of the bid to Columbia Gas.  Columbia Gas will award the Flexible Balancing PAL included in this open season to the shipper with the highest calculated total monthly rate due Columbia Gas, submitted in the form of a monthly rate (bid per dth of MIQ).  However, any bid above recourse rate for Rate Schedule PAL will be treated as a bid at the maximum recourse rate for Rate Schedule PAL.  If two or more bidders submit bids with equal monthly rates, and which are conforming to the terms of this notice, and there is insufficient capacity available to serve all such bidders, then Columbia Gas shall determine the successful bidder based on the order in which the bids were received.
 
 
 
Contact Information/Bid Submission
If any interested party has questions or desires additional information concerning this open season, please contact one of the following individuals: 
 
Diana Roberts
Diana_Roberts@TCEnergy.com
832-320-5454
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Columbia Gas Transmission, LLC
Bid Form
Bids must be emailed to
Diana_Roberts@TCEnergy.com   
 
Bid Form must be filled out in its entirety
Open Season # 2026-0319
 
Open Season ID
 
Company Name

Start Date Requested
 
End Date Requested
 
Maximum Inventory Quantity (MIQ)
 
Monthly Rate ($/dth of MIQ)
 
If Bidder will accept less than stated MIQ, please state that amount here
